title: net-snmp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[5.8-31.0.1]
- fix error index value when snmpget is used a proxy pass [Orabug: 34905643]

[1:5.8-31]
- fix use after free issue (RHEL-64696)
